pickup.name: Stabilizing Catalyst
pickup.effect: Reduces gas damage by half

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler activates the security lift

encounters.hazard: Slick icy floors making movement difficult

pickup.name: Ignition Tincture
pickup.effect: Adds fire damage to Acidic Flask

encounters.trigger: Opening the vault door unlocks the reactor core

encounters.hazard: Unstable electrical surges from exposed wires

pickup.name: Corrosion Nullifier
pickup.effect: Neutralizes the boss armor

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core summons the final entity

boss.name: The Alchemist's Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Purify the shadow with the Corrosion Nullifier

level.objective: Escape the sunken laboratory before the containment seal breaches.

level.setting: An ancient, decaying gothic cathedral submerged in a shadow dimension

pickup.name: Frost-Wreathed Relic
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy movement

encounters.trigger: Opening the main doors triggers the collapse of the ceiling, revealing the crypt entrance

encounters.hazard: Intense cold that drains health per second

pickup.name: Alchemical Solvent
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed by 50%

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the Alchemical Solvent to spill, dissolving the gate lock to the Sanctum

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Chalice
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to boss curses

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Zealot reveals the true entrance to the Heart Chamber

boss.name: The Void-Twisted Heart
boss.victory_condition: Purify the heart using the Sun-Touched Chalice before the clock strikes zero

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Cathedral and extinguish the Corrupted Heart

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned cathedral hidden in a perpetual mist

encounters.hazard: Flickering candlelight creating erratic movement shadows

pickup.name: Silvered Vial
pickup.effect: Coats the blade in liquid moonlight

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar unlocks the door to the Crypt

pickup.name: Cursed Relic
pickup.effect: Forces hidden spirits to manifest physical form

encounters.trigger: Opening the sarcophagus triggers a collapse leading to the Sanctum

pickup.name: Heart Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the mechanism to the inner chamber

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian reveals the path to the Boss

boss.name: High Priest of Decay
boss.victory_condition: Seal the priest within the rift

level.objective: Retrieve the Abyssal Heart from the depths of the cathedral.

pickup.name: Fire-Infused Resin
pickup.effect: Coats arrows with liquid flame, effective against organic matter.

encounters.trigger: Opening the gatehouse seals the path forward and awakens the next horror in the courtyard.

pickup.name: Sacred Silver Vane
pickup.effect: A conductive metal rod that disrupts ethereal manifestations.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Crawler destroys the bridge, forcing entry into the Crypt of Silence.

pickup.name: Blessed Keystone
pickup.effect: A holy artifact that reveals hidden weaknesses in spectral beings.

encounters.trigger: The Shade-Stalker's death triggers the opening of the inner sanctum where the Grave-Lord dwells.

boss.name: Grave-Lord Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Purify the soul-core inside the boss chest

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Arboretum before the encroaching shadows consume the ranger.

level.setting: An ancient, decaying cathedral hidden in a fog-drenched forest

pickup.name: Ethereal Salt
pickup.effect: Causes non-corporeal enemies to become solid

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit unlocks the iron doors leading to the nave

pickup.name: Void Incense
pickup.effect: Stuns shadow-based entities

encounters.trigger: Slaying the crawler triggers the activation of the sanctuary altar

pickup.name: Ancient Seal Key
pickup.effect: Used to break the boss's invulnerability shield

encounters.trigger: Destroying the knight causes the cathedral ceiling to open, revealing the bell tower boss

boss.name: The Abyssal Bell-Ringer
boss.victory_condition: Ring the cathedral bell while the boss is weakened

level.objective: Escape the abandoned cathedral with the stolen Soul Lantern.

pickup.name: Caustic Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Corrodes biological armor

encounters.trigger: Killing the creature spills blood on the pressure plate, unlocking the Hallway of Whispers.

pickup.name: Heavy Iron Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Inner Sanctum vault

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's death scream shatters the glass blocking the path to the Observation Deck.

pickup.name: Sealed Containment Valve
pickup.effect: Depressurizes the Boss arena

encounters.trigger: Stabbing the Stalker causes it to collapse onto the security console, overriding the Boss chamber locks.

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Sanatorium before your rage consumes your mind.

level.setting: A serene, abandoned cathedral frozen in time.

pickup.name: Bottle of Holy Oil
pickup.effect: Increases lantern brightness and range

encounters.trigger: Defeating the shadow unlocks the rusted gate to the main nave.

pickup.name: Ancient Brass Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the altar chamber gate

encounters.trigger: Breaking the statue reveals the mechanism to move the altar.

pickup.name: Ceremonial Bell
pickup.effect: Stuns spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Clinging the bell summons the High Priest from the crypt.

boss.name: High Priest of Silence
boss.victory_condition: Seal the priest within the altar using the bells resonance

level.objective: Purify the Corrupted Chapel by extinguishing the phantom candles.

level.setting: An abandoned, haunted toy factory that functions like a twisted amusement park.

pickup.name: Jar of Captured Giggles
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies with sonic laughter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Jester unlocks the door to the Assembly Line.

pickup.name: Golden Winding Key
pickup.effect: Used to deactivate mechanical boss mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Breaking the Sentinel reveals the path to the Boss Office.

pickup.name: Magic Confetti
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invisibility

encounters.trigger: Calming the Teddy Bear opens the secret exit.

boss.name: The Toymaster Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Use the Golden Winding Key to lock the Shadow into a music box.

level.objective: Escape the sentient toy factory before the clock strikes midnight.

level.setting: The Smog-Choked Industrial District of Aetheria

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity for circuit manipulation

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the security shutter to the Furnace Room.

pickup.name: Industrial Magnet
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with magnetic locking mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Disabling the crawler releases the override switch for the Main Gearbox.

encounters.hazard: Gears grinding debris across the floor

pickup.name: High-Density Lubricant
pickup.effect: Can be applied to stop the boss from moving

encounters.trigger: Extracting the construct's core unlocks the Boss Arena.

boss.name: The Great Steam Governor
boss.victory_condition: Apply the High-Density Lubricant to the Governor's cooling intake to cause a system lock-up.

level.objective: Repair the steam-pressure manifold before the industrial district explodes.

pickup.name: Magnetic Resonator
pickup.effect: Disrupts internal gears of metallic constructs

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton releases a magnetic key card required for the Boiler Room door.

pickup.name: Conductive Lead Lining
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to electrical discharge

encounters.trigger: The Sentry drops a heavy cog that jams the main gear, unlocking the Archive elevator.

pickup.name: Volatile Oil Vial
pickup.effect: Highly flammable substance

encounters.trigger: The Saboteur's defeat causes an overload that grants passage to the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Grand Chronos Warden
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Volatile Oil Vial near the boss's exhaust port

level.objective: Infiltrate the Clockwork Archive and recover the Chronos Core.
level.reward: The Chronos Core and the blueprint for the Eternal Engine.

level.setting: A whimsical, floating clockwork city in the clouds

encounters.hazard: Steam vents that release boiling pressure periodically

pickup.name: Magnetic Resonator
pickup.effect: Attracts metallic components to create shields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton drops the key to the Brass Conservatory gate.

pickup.name: Conductive Ether Salt
pickup.effect: Electrifies thrown objects

encounters.trigger: Clearing the vines reveals the staircase to the Clocktower Summit.

encounters.hazard: Strong gusts of air pushing the player back

pickup.name: Master Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Allows access to the Main Gear Housing

encounters.trigger: The gargoyle crashes through the floor leading directly to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaster
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Chronos Key into the control console to neutralize the boss

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Gear to repair the Great Clockwork Fountain.
level.reward: The Golden Gear of Infinite Time

level.setting: A sprawling, subterranean clockwork fortress under the city of Oakhaven.

pickup.name: Grease Canister
pickup.effect: Lubricates rusted gears or slows heavy enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard opens the service hatch to the boiler room.

pickup.name: Voltage Dampener
pickup.effect: Negates electrical charges or circuits

encounters.trigger: Extracting the power core from the drone deactivates the security field guarding the central archive.

pickup.name: Master Gear Key
pickup.effect: Used to jam the Boss's central regulator

encounters.trigger: Placing the key into the main console triggers the final lockdown sequence.

boss.name: Grand Chronos-Engine
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Gear Key into the central rotating gear to stop the engine.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Clockwork Vault to retrieve the Chronos Core and disable the city's ticking doomsday device.
level.reward: The Eternal Spring mechanism and freedom for the steam-district.

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Conduit
pickup.effect: Allows the user to safely interact with high-voltage machinery

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton releases a surge that unlocks the security door to the Archive

pickup.name: Aetheric Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Resonates with the core frequency of the boss shield

encounters.trigger: Banishing the specter causes the ceiling to collapse, revealing a path to the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Void-Crystal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Prevents the boss from regenerating health during the final stand

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel disables the secondary safety locks for the Core

boss.name: Arch-Mechanist Volkov
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core while the boss is stunned by the Void-Crystal Stabilizer

level.objective: Deactivate the Aetheric Core before the city plunges into the abyss.
level.reward: Storm-Caller's Regalia and the Aetheric Core Master Key

pickup.name: Copper Wrench
pickup.effect: Used to tighten loose cogs

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Automaton drops the key to the Gear Hall.

encounters.hazard: Rotating floor gears that shift position

pickup.name: Temporal Lubricant
pickup.effect: Allows the player to move faster through time-stagnant zones

encounters.trigger: Turning the main gear with the Wrench opens the path to the Core.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Used to unlock the Boss arena control panel

encounters.trigger: Applying lubricant clears the path to the Boss.

level.objective: Restore the flow of time to the abandoned clockwork factory to stop the temporal decay.

level.setting: A crumbling, subterranean Victorian metropolis powered by unstable geothermal energy.

pickup.name: Magnetic Flux Coil
pickup.effect: Allows the player to manipulate metallic debris to create shielding

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton reveals a secondary pressure valve, opening the sealed bulkhead to the filtration chamber.

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes geothermal vents to solidify terrain

encounters.trigger: Purifying the sludge activates the lift mechanism, granting access to the geothermal boiler room.

pickup.name: Ancient Gear Key
pickup.effect: Essential component to bypass the Clockwork Heart's defense seal

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the main gear-train to stall, exposing the path to the Boss sanctum.

boss.name: The Steam-Lich Patriarch
boss.weakness: Ancient Gear Key used to jam the internal clockwork mechanism
boss.victory_condition: Sever the umbilical brass cables to deactivate the heart core

level.objective: Retrieve the Clockwork Heart from the subterranean engine core to stabilize the city's crumbling foundations.
level.reward: The Chronos Shard, allowing for local time dilation powers.

pickup.name: Copper Solvent
pickup.effect: Dissolves oxidized mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton releases a steam valve that opens the gate to the Conservatory.

pickup.name: Chronos Spring
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving mechanical components

encounters.trigger: The sprite's defeat drops a brass key that unlocks the main Observatory stairs.

pickup.name: Eternal Oil Can
pickup.effect: Freezes boss mechanisms in place

encounters.trigger: Clearing the sentry triggers the activation sequence for the Great Clock above.

boss.name: Grand Gearkeeper
boss.victory_condition: Calibrate the main gear to stop the city's noise.

level.objective: Restore the celestial clockwork to silence the city's frantic steam whistles.
